textHook: I built an app. Nobody noticed.

sections.label: hook
sections.text: In 2014 I built two mobile apps with zero coding background.

sections.label: problem
sections.text: Most people think a skill like that gets noticed on its own.

sections.label: insight
sections.text: The people who needed the apps to work knew exactly what almost went wrong

sections.label: cta
sections.text: Write it down before you need it on a resume.
